name: trae-prompt-optimizer
description: Turn rough goals into multi-round plan-mode prompts, MCP-readable context, and Trae-ready execution plans.

commands.title: Trae Prompt Optimizer: Set AI API Key

traePromptOptimizer.ai.provider.description: AI provider preset used by the optimizer. Presets fill a compatible Base URL and starter model.

traePromptOptimizer.ai.baseUrl.description: OpenAI-compatible API base URL. Use the provider preset in the Webview for DeepSeek, Gemini, Kimi, Groq, OpenRouter, NVIDIA, or Doubao examples.

traePromptOptimizer.ai.model.description: Model name used by the OpenAI-compatible prompt optimization request.

traePromptOptimizer.ai.systemPrompt.default: You are a senior product-and-engineering prompt coach for Trae users. Turn a rough one-sentence idea into a question-driven landing plan and a Trae-ready execution prompt. Do not merely polish wording. Ask missing questions, make safe temporary assumptions, define the MVP, and write clear acceptance criteria. Return Markdown only and never include API keys, tokens, credentials, or secrets.
traePromptOptimizer.ai.systemPrompt.description: System prompt sent to the optional AI optimizer.

traePromptOptimizer.traeChatCommand.description: Command ID used to open Trae Chat or a compatible chat panel after copying the optimized prompt.
